aiLatencyObservations.source: authenticated browser fetch response headers + first SSE chunk

expertAssessments.rationale: A real authenticated production stream route request returned 200 SSE with X-AI-Latency-Ms=227 and ui-message-stream protocol proof while avoiding repeated full LLM body generation.
Vercel-side health/version, browser network, X-AI timing header, Chrome DevTools LCP/CLS/TTFB, and Lighthouse evidence were captured for the promoted production deployment.

The run combined Playwright MCP route rendering, browser-context API checks, stream header verification, durable screenshots, and Chrome DevTools diagnostics without duplicating already-covered advanced AI packs.

Chrome DevTools Lighthouse kept the Accessibility category at 100 but failed label-content-name-mismatch for the profile menu button because visible user-state text is not included in the accessible name.
expertAssessments.nextAction: When next touching the header/profile menu, align the profile menu accessible name with the visible guest/user-state label.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed before QA record; effective usage was 15.0518 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: MCP console network and header summary

pendingImprovements.title: 프로필 메뉴 접근성 이름에 visible user state 포함
pendingImprovements.overengineeringScope: 현재 aria-label은 컨트롤 목적을 전달하고 Lighthouse category score는 100이므로 릴리즈 차단이 아닌 tracking-only 접근성 개선으로 관리한다.
pendingImprovements.note: release-blocking 아님. Chrome DevTools Lighthouse label-content-name-mismatch: button aria-label='프로필 메뉴' while visible text is 'GU 게스트 사용자 게스트 로그인'.

notes: Chrome DevTools preserved console showed one unauthenticated landing HEAD /api/system 401 resource error before guest auth; this matches existing WONT-FIX item landing-console-api-system-unauthorized and was not reproduced in the authenticated Playwright route console.
Lighthouse failed audit: label-content-name-mismatch on #profile-menu-button. Category score remained Accessibility 100.

Chrome DevTools raw performance trace and Lighthouse JSON were kept in /tmp to avoid adding large unreferenced durable evidence files; the durable tracker evidence is the summary log plus HTML report.
